title: 軽い言葉じゃ意味がねえ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear that the interview Inari One took at the
beginning of the year will be televised, so I sit
down with her to watch it.

text_block_list.name: TV Reporter
text_block_list.text:
And so we asked Inari One, the budding star from
Oi, about her upcoming racing plans. You won't
believe her answer!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
My next big goal is none other than the Japan
Dirt Derby!

text_block_list.name: TV Reporter
text_block_list.text: Everyone knows the Derby, so who would've expected that she'd choose the Japan Dirt Derby? Is her plan to stick to dirt for the foreseeable future? When we pressed for more information...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Talkin' like a blabbermouth isn't my style. Sorry,
but you'll just have to see what happens on the
track!

text_block_list.name: TV Reporter
text_block_list.text:
We weren't able to get an answer out of her. The
shock and mystique of it all is so confounding!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ergh... hearing 'em act all shocked is makin' my
skin crawl! I don't get it! Is it really that surprisin'
for me to run at Oi?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That kinda attitude is 'xactly what I wanna
change.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah. And that's why I'm gonna run in the Japan Dirt Derby and the Tokyo Daishoten!

text_block_list.name: TV Reporter
text_block_list.text:
To try and get a grasp of what drives Inari One,
we decided to visit Oi, the place where she raced
before transferring to Tracen Academy.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Huh?! They couldn't be—

text_block_list.name: TV Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Could we ask you a few questions about Inari
One's decision to compete in the Japan Dirt
Derby?

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Inari's plannin' to compete in the Japan Dirt
Derby?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's Chief! The reporters came lookin' for
him too?!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: ...Izzat true? Did Inari say that herself?

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: Ahh, that dummy! What on earth's she thinkin'?!

text_block_list.name: TV Reporter
text_block_list.text: Even her past mentor was confused—angered even, by her decision!

text_block_list.name: TV Reporter
text_block_list.text:
What could she be aiming for? All we can do is
keep our eyes on her, anticipating her next moves
with bated breath.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
choice_data_list: Let's set the record straight with Chief!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If he knows why Inari One plans to compete in the
regional races, I'm sure his anger will be quelled.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Just leave it be, Boss.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Just leave it be, Boss.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Don't say anythin' to Chief.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Chief was the one who nudged me into
transferrin'. He wanted me to make a ruckus in
the central races.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
In his eyes, I'm goin' back on my word by returnin'
to the regionals. It makes sense why he'd be
upset.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That's why... I can't face him until I've got
somethin' to show for it.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
It's okay, Boss. Ya know, I respect the people of
Oi more than anyone... I know how strong they
are.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
It's okay, Boss. Ya know, I respect the people of
Oi more than anyone... I know how strong they
are.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: And that's all the more reason I can't tell him.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I can't just say I wanna reach the top of the regionals.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
My next big goal is none other than the Japan
Dirt Derby!

text_block_list.name: Male Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Ah... Wait, the Japan Dirt Derby?! As in the Japan
Dirt Derby that's held at Oi Racecourse?!

text_block_list.name: Female Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Does that mean your focus is not in the centrals?
Or will you be competing solely in dirt—

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Annnd that's all ya get!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Talkin' like a blabbermouth isn't my style. Sorry,
but you'll just have to see what happens on the
track!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that I think about it, Inari One never
mentioned in that interview anything about
reaching for the top...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm not one to go on 'n' on about strivin' for my
goals!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm more about showin' than tellin', if ya catch my
drift.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Otherwise, I'd be doin' a disservice, not just to
Chief, but everyone from Oi.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: It's time for training. Let's go, Boss.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: It's time for training. Let's go, Boss.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I finally understand how Inari One feels, but... is
this the best way to go about it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm swept over with a vague uneasiness as I fail to
come up with a solution.
